channel.title: Docs update: new Troubleshooting page and other changes
channel.description:
We made some changes to our docs recently:
- **[CLI Commands](https://docs.frontity.org/frontity-cli)**: we reorganized this section to group commands and add information about Environment Variables.
- **[Troubleshooting](https://docs.frontity.org/guides/troubleshooting)**: we created this new page to explain common issues detected in Frontity projects and how to solve them.
- **[Guides](https://docs.frontity.org/guides)**: we moved some pages, such as [React](https://docs.frontity.org/guides/react-basic), [JavaScript](https://docs.frontity.org/guides/javascript-basics) and [SEO](https://docs.frontity.org/guides/seo), under this section and improved its description.
In addition, we renamed some other sections:
* Learning Frontity can be found now as [Core Concepts](https://docs.frontity.org/learning-frontity). * Frontity Packages as [Packages](https://docs.frontity.org/api-reference-1). * Frontity CLI as [CLI Commands](https://docs.frontity.org/frontity-cli).
We'll keep improving and iterating on the documentation. Feel free to ask if you have any questions.
Community contributions to the documentation are always welcome. You can read more on how to contribute [here](https://github.com/frontity/docs/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

item.title: Docs update: new Troubleshooting page and other changes
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
We made some changes to our docs recently:

  • CLI Commands: we reorganized this section to group commands and add information about Environment Variables.

  • Troubleshooting: we created this new page to explain common issues detected in Frontity projects and how to solve them.

  • Guides: we moved some pages, such as React, JavaScript and SEO, under this section and improved its description.

In addition, we renamed some other sections:

  • Learning Frontity can be found now as Core Concepts.
  • Frontity Packages as Packages.
  • Frontity CLI as CLI Commands.

We’ll keep improving and iterating on the documentation. Feel free to ask if you have any questions.

Community contributions to the documentation are always welcome. You can read more on how to contribute here.

Read full topic
item.source: Docs update: new Troubleshooting page and other changes
